selection_reasons.regenerate-then-repair-5x3x1: main-agent implementation of the Sol-requested generation-then-falsification primitive
selection_reasons.repair-falsify-5x1-efficient: current panel winner retained unchanged for replication
selection_reasons.repair-falsify-5x3-efficient: pooled champion across 12 fresh panels: 68/156 exact; 40.4% weakest family

source: mechanical anchors plus iteration 15 Sol director

strategies.hypothesis: A single independent answer is the minimum-cost baseline.
strategies.name: Direct One

strategies.hypothesis: A small independent plurality is a stable low-cost baseline.
strategies.name: Five-Vote Plurality

strategies.hypothesis: A five-answer bank paired with the validated three-reviewer falsification mechanism may retain much of the champion's accuracy at eight calls per case rather than twelve; earlier five-solver repair systems reached 0.417–0.500 pooled accuracy.
strategies.name: Efficient Five-Bank Falsifying Repair

strategies.hypothesis: Replicate the unchanged call-efficient mechanism because its strongly positive pooled correction balance remains promising despite noisy exact accuracy, and it requires two fewer review calls than the retained champion whenever review activates.
strategies.name: One-Review Five-Bank Falsifying Repair

strategies.hypothesis: Compressing nine independent answers into three committee delegates may reduce candidate overload and correlated noise for a single falsifying repairer. Comparing its helpful and harmful interventions with raw-bank nine-by-one repair tests whether the Iteration 15 harm came from reviewer variance or excessive candidate exposure.
strategies.name: Committee-Delegate One-Review Repair

strategies.hypothesis: Blind regeneration raised candidate coverage on two panels but plurality failed to surface the new answers. Three blind fixed-lens regenerators now expand the bank, then one fresh falsifying integrator examines the shuffled unique augmented candidates and may repair them. This isolates candidate integration without changing the generation stage.
strategies.name: Blind Regeneration then Falsifying Integration
